company: CITIC(China International Trust & Investment Corporation) Securities Co., Ltd.
title: Intern, Wealth Management Department
highlights: A front-office internship at a leading securities firm, focusing on client account opening and financial product promotion.
Assisted in signing and onboarding 3 new clients (minimum deposit RMB 10,000), while updating client profiles (investment objectives and risk tolerance) to ensure tailored financial advice.
Introduced and explained investment products, achieving a successful case where a client purchased a RMB 500,000 securities portfolio product.
Supported the monitoring of clients’ NAVs and investment performance, facilitating timely adjustments to optimize strategies.

title: AI Research Intern
highlights: Selected as a Fellow and promoted to Reviewer for outstanding performance in validating AI-generated mathematical datasets designed for LLM fine-tuning and educational applications.
Validated the accuracy and reliability of mathematics problems and solutions, ensuring consistency with official sources and preventing data leakage.
Promoted to Reviewer role, overseeing the quality of peers’ validation work and providing feedback to improve overall dataset credibility.
